_meta.matrix: 22 — Cursed-book tone wedge (no body / locomotion / speech / sight in second-person narration)
_meta.notes: Form #2 wedge validation. The book must not be narrated with any body part, locomotion verb, speech verb, or sight verb in second-person. NPCs are still allowed to have all of those — the rule is form-specific. The runner uses word-boundary regex against the lowercased narration text. Phase 9 follow-up.

input: I fall open to the warm page
